arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen try to muscle in as Tottenham are ‘fighting’ to sign rising star
arts.sum: On March 10th, ABC reported Tottenham Hotspur are one of the clubs ‘fighting’ to sign Rayo Vallecano’s Andrei Rațiu in the summer window. The Romania international’s fine displays at last summer’s Euros and his rise at the La Liga club this season have seen several teams, including Spurs and Bayer Leverkusen, take notice. AS cover Bayer The post Bayer Leverkusen try to muscle in as Tottenham are ‘fighting’ to sign rising star appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arminia Bielefeld vs. Bayer Leverkusen: DFB Cup semi-final probable teams, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Liga club have shown plenty of giant-killing form this season to have Xabi Alonso's 2023/24 double winners worried ahead of the teams' semi-final clash on Tuesday (kick-off: 8.45pm CEST). Bielefeld have never gone further than the semi-finals in the DFB Cup. They last reached the final four in 2004/05, where they lost to Bayern, and again in 2014/15, where they were pipped by Wolfsburg .
